calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motino For Appointment Of Receiver And Enforce Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-12-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's Motion For Appointment Of Receiver And Enforce Judgment is granted. No opposition has been filed. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Ntc Of Mo To Compel Answers To Post-Judgt Discovery
Off Calendar Aug-17-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED.

Assignee Creditors Trade Association's Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order.
COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT (612)
